ruleset.name: Salesforce Platform Playground
ruleset.description: Repository-specific Apex documentation and Trigger structure rules.

rule.name: ApexDocWithoutProperties
rule.message: Class, constructor, and public or global method declarations must have ApexDoc.
rule.description: Requires ApexDoc for public contracts while allowing line comments on properties.

rule.name: TriggerDelegatesToHandler
rule.message: Trigger bodies may only route Trigger contexts to handler methods.
rule.description: Allows Trigger context routing and handler calls, but rejects queries, DML, assignments, loops, and non-handler calls.

property.name: xpath
